 Index: Makefile
 ===================================================================
 RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/x11/x3270/Makefile,v
 retrieving revision 1.36
 diff -u -r1.36 Makefile
 --- Makefile	22 Aug 2009 00:39:14 -0000	1.36
 +++ Makefile	26 Jun 2010 06:46:04 -0000
 @@ -6,13 +6,12 @@
  #
  
  PORTNAME=	x3270
 -PORTVERSION=	3.3.7
 -PORTREVISION=	2
 +PORTVERSION=	3.3.10
  CATEGORIES=	x11 net
 -MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/OldFiles
 -EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 +MASTER_SITES=	http://x3270.bgp.nu/download/
 +EXTRACT_SUFX=	ga5-src.tgz
  
 -MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 +MAINTAINER=	ecrist@secure-computing.net
  COMMENT=	3270 Terminal emulator
  
  BUILD_DEPENDS=	bdftopcf:${PORTSDIR}/x11-fonts/bdftopcf \
 @@ -20,9 +19,13 @@
  		mkfontscale:${PORTSDIR}/x11-fonts/mkfontscale
  
  USE_IMAKE=	yes
 +USE_ICONV=	yes
  USE_XORG=	ice sm x11 xaw xext xmu xt
  GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
  CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--without-pr3287 --with-fontdir=local --disable-dbcs
 +CONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS="-I${PREFIX}/include" \
 +		LDFLAGS="-L${PREFIX}/lib" \
 +		LIBS="-L${PREFIX}/lib"
  .if defined(WITHOUT_OPENSSL)
  CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-ssl
  .else
